content.question: What are the quantified transportation, health, and educational outcome costs for Hungarian rural students if commute times to consolidated schools exceed 30 minutes, and which student populations (by income, disability, household structure) face greatest burden?
content.reduction_path: Conduct household survey and administrative data linkage in Hungarian rural consolidation areas, measuring commute times, breakfast/nutrition access, school attendance rates, standardized test performance, and physical fitness metrics, with stratification by household income quartile and student demographic characteristics
